        raise ValueError("Column must be a positive integer (1-indexed)")
    
    if not os.path.exists(input_file):

    if not isinstance(column, int):

    # Build the sort command with the specified column
    # -k{column},{column} means sort by only that specific column

    # To match expected behavior, we should sort by column but remove duplicates based on entire line
